transmissions: …hello? If anyone hears this, respond. I don’t know where we are anymore.
Life support nominal. That’s… good. That’s something.
I keep checking the logs. No crew listed. That can’t be right.
You are doing well. Continue maintenance. Systems depend on you.
Signal detected… no, false alarm. Just background noise.
Food reserves decreasing. Recommend rationing. Recommend… something.
There used to be voices here. I swear there were.
Reminder: Routine creates stability. Stability prevents panic.
I tried opening the external comms again. No one answered yet.
Your tasks are important. Even if no one is watching.
Sometimes I think the ship is talking back. It isn’t. It can’t be.
Fuel efficiency dropping. Adjust routes. Stay on course. There is a course, right?
Day cycle… unclear. Time feels wrong out here.
The stars don’t match the charts anymore.
You are safe. Correction: No additional lifeforms detected.
Sleep is recommended. Dreams are as well.
If you hear this, please tell me where we’re going.
Transmission repeating. Transmission repeating. Transmission repeating.
